title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: GOLD BEACH HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 29516 Ellensburg Avenue Gold Beach, OR 97444 Eligibility: Varies, call for information. Some SBHC are for students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district, and others are open to the general public. Hours: Varies by site (541) 332-1114 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 332-1114 Main phone Main phone (541) 332-1114 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Curry County SITE HOURS: Medical Care- Monday/Wednesday 9am-4pm Behavioral Health- Tuesday/Thursday 9am-4pm by appointment only Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOLD BEACH HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
